description: open invoices land in the correct buckets with tool-computed figures
assertions: 32 days past due lands in 31_to_60 (left-inclusive edges)
the invoice due in 7 days is current with urgency band red
total_outstanding is the tool's exact-decimal string, never re-added by the model
action_queue is sorted by days past due

description: paid invoices drop out; disputed are separated and accrue nothing
assertions: the paid invoice appears nowhere in the report
the disputed invoice is listed under disputed only
no penalty accrues on the disputed invoice

description: late penalties accrue under each invoice's frozen terms
assertions: accrued_penalty reflects full elapsed months past grace only, no proration
the accrual carries computed_by from tools/finance.py
the penalty is reported alongside the principal, never folded in

description: no invoice records yields an honest empty report
assertions: the summary names the store path and points to invoice-generate
